subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, render thanks unto God that thou hast a son who hath been vouchsafed the privilege of service at the Divine Threshold and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله شکر کن خدا را که پسری داری که در آستان الهی بخدمت موفق گشته و در
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power of prayer, @service to others; to the Cause of God
